name: Premium Headphones
description: Wireless noise cancelling headphones for superior audio.
details: Enjoy immersive sound with adaptive active noise cancellation, long battery life, and a comfortable over-ear fit for all-day listening.
specs: Built-in microphone with voice assistant support

name: Luxury Watch
description: Elegant wristwatch with premium leather strap.
details: Water-resistant design with Swiss-inspired movement and a polished finish that suits both formal and casual wear.

name: Gaming Mouse
description: High-precision RGB gaming mouse with ergonomic design.
details: Features customizable DPI, programmable buttons, and a soft grip shell for marathon gaming sessions.

name: Smart Speaker
description: Voice-controlled smart speaker with rich sound.
details: Packed with Wi-Fi, smart assistant support, and multi-room audio for hands-free control and clear playback.

name: Fitness Tracker
description: Track your workouts, heart rate, and sleep.
details: Stay on top of your wellness with real-time heart rate monitoring, activity reminders, and sleep analysis.

name: Travel Backpack
description: Durable carry-on backpack with laptop pouch.
details: Designed for travel with a padded laptop compartment, water-resistant fabric, and multiple organization pockets.

name: Smartwatch Pro
description: Fitness-focused smartwatch with blood oxygen and GPS.
details: Monitor workouts, sleep cycles, and stress levels while staying connected with notifications and voice assistant support.

name: Wireless Charger
description: Fast Qi wireless charger for phones and earbuds.
details: Compact charging pad with overcharge protection and rapid power delivery for compatible devices.

name: Noise-Cancelling Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with premium sound.
details: Experience crisp audio, long battery life, and adaptive noise cancellation for commuting and workouts.

name: Home Security Camera
description: 1080p smart security camera with night vision.
details: Keep your home safe with motion alerts, two-way audio, and secure cloud storage options.
